message:
bd-1av0.8: implement node:http/https shim with EventEmitter-based client

Replace stub http/https modules with full ClientRequest/IncomingMessage
implementation routed through pi.http() hostcall. Adds STATUS_CODES,
METHODS exports, URL parsing, and request body accumulation.

- src/http_shim.rs: new module with NODE_HTTP_JS and NODE_HTTPS_JS
- tests/node_http_shim.rs: 18 tests covering API surface, imports, errors
- src/extensions_js.rs: wire http_shim module sources, fix stub test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
